files.title: Files
files.description: Browse, download, and upload files on your Portal
files.emptyHint: Drag & drop files here to upload them
files.permissionHint: Some folders require root access and cannot be opened
files.deleteConfirmMessage: This permanently removes it from the device and cannot be undone.
files.name: Name

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: Run ADB shell commands on your Portal
terminal.placeholder: Type a command and press Enter…
terminal.welcome: OpenPortal shell. Type 'help' for tips, 'clear' to reset.
terminal.help: Runs commands via 'adb shell'. Output is captured when the command finishes (not a live PTY). Use ↑/↓ for history.
terminal.clearedHint: Use the history (↑/↓) to recall previous commands.

logcat.title: Logcat
logcat.empty: No log lines yet — press Start to begin streaming

screen.title: Screen
screen.description: Capture a screenshot or mirror the Portal screen
screen.empty: No image yet — capture a screenshot or start the live view
screen.scrcpyUnsupported: Live mirroring needs WebCodecs (use a recent Chromium browser)
screen.controlHint: Click and drag on the screen to control the device. Audio is unavailable on Android 10.
screen.mirrorNote: “Live view” polls the framebuffer (no input). “Mirror with control” streams H.264 via scrcpy with touch input — no audio on Android 10.

flags.title: Feature Flags
flags.description: Browse and edit device_config feature flags and internal settings
flags.resetConfirmMessage: This deletes the override and restores the default value.
flags.warning: Changing internal flags can destabilize the device. Only edit values you understand.
